title: Airbnb Q4 2023 Earnings Preview: Here's What to Expect
text: Before the earnings announcement, Airbnb was expected to report strong growth in revenue and earnings for Q4 2023, with a 14% YoY increase in revenue. Analysts expected Airbnb's Q4 revenue to grow more than 21% to about $1.9 billion, with EPS projected to jump considerably to $0.25 from $0.08 in the prior-year quarter. Revenue came in at $2.22 billion vs. $2.17 billion expected by analysts, and revenue climbed 17% from $1.9 billion in the same quarter a year earlier. Airbnb posted adjusted earnings of $738 million in the fourth quarter, with analysts expecting $645 million. The company reported 98.8 million nights and experiences booked, up 12% from a year ago, and above the 98 million expected by analysts. Average daily rates increased 3% from a year ago to $157 in the fourth quarter, and the company ended 2023 with 7.7 million active listings, up 18% from a year earlier.
